residual_risks: Production cutover remains blocked until real D1 import validation, authenticated smoke, Better Stack monitor evidence, operator approval, and seven-green-days evidence exist.
Manual monitor-state files are accepted only with explicit source, path, and fresh per-monitor timestamps; Better Stack API evidence remains preferred.
This PR prepares evidence capture and validation only. It does not authorize DNS, GCP, D1 import, or decommission actions.

tests.details: Final rerun passed: lint and format clean, @manut/cloudflare test passed with 26 files and 230 tests, readiness stayed blocked at 14/19 with the five operator gates.

manual_reproductions.scenario: Legacy authenticated smoke input without operator evidence
manual_reproductions.details: buildAuthenticatedSmokeReport and validateEvidenceJson now reject missing operator session evidence.

manual_reproductions.scenario: Legacy operator approval input without schema v2 operator inputs
manual_reproductions.details: validateEvidenceJson now rejects missing or pre-v2 operator approval schema before readiness can pass.

manual_reproductions.scenario: Better Stack monitor-state file without freshness provenance
manual_reproductions.details: cutover readiness now requires monitor_source, monitor_state_path, and fresh per-monitor timestamps for monitor-state evidence.
